Artifact entityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: http://www.softlang.org/ontologies/tbox#ArtifactEntity

Ontological entity used to represent software artifacts, artifact families, and artifact-related instances
has super-classes
Entity c
has sub-classes
Software artifact c
is in domain of
classifies op, conforms to op, defines op, element of op, is artifact of op, is processed by op
is in range of
classifies op, conforms to op, has affected artifact op, has artifact op, has element op, has input artifact op, has output artifact op, is defined by op, processes op
has members
API description artifact ni, Build script artifact ni, Configuration artifact ni, Grammar artifact ni, Grammar of grammars artifact ni, Graph query artifact ni, JSON document artifact ni, JSON schema artifact ni, Logic-program artifact ni, Markup artifact ni, Megamodel artifact ni, Metamodel artifact ni, Model artifact ni, Ontology artifact ni, Program artifact ni, Proof artifact ni, Property graph artifact ni, RDF graph artifact ni, Relational data artifact ni, Relational query artifact ni, Relational schema artifact ni, Requirements artifact ni, Rule artifact ni, Semantic data artifact ni, Shape artifact ni, Software artifact ni, XML document artifact ni, XML schema artifact ni

Entityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: http://www.softlang.org/ontologies/tbox#Entity

Top-level category for entities represented in this ontology. Entities should be linked to at least one descriptive document via foaf:isPrimaryTopicOf or foaf:page.
has super-classes
has sub-classes
Artifact entity c, Conceptual entity c, Formal entity c, Issue entity c, Language entity c, Property entity c, Tool entity c
is in domain of
has BibTeX dp, has area op, has part op, has space op, is part of op, is used by op, serves op, uses op
is in range of
has part op, is area of op, is part of op, is served by op, is space of op, is used by op, uses op

Entity c

specifies op

has partop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

uses op

Entity c

Entity c

is part of op

Legend back to ToC

c: Classes
op: Object Properties
dp: Data Properties
ni: Named Individuals
